title: Keeston Interconnector overhead line (SWT2216 /60MJ285), S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  1 October 2025  Location   KeestonPembrokeshireWales   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line. "
